emails.subject: EES Spreadsheet Update
emails.body: EES Spreadsheet Update Kate, I am checking out EES February deals with Brocklyn Couch and problems were noted on two deals 512775.1 on the 5th 527967.1 on the 22nd. EES was not agreeing to what we (Enron Power) has in Enpower. Per Phil Platter our numbers are correct and the worksheet needs to be updated to reflect Enpower. EES stated they will adjust their numbers once they get an updated sheet. Thanks, Mark
